name: Vegetarian Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1 cup of slightly cooked chick peas (drained from canned), drained cooked navy, pinto, or soy beans.
2. Mix in 1/2 cup of instant uncooked oatmeal, 1/8 teaspoon salt, 1 teaspoon paprika, 1/2 teaspoon dried basil, 2 tablespoons soy sauce, and 1/4 teaspoon ground black pepper with olive oil as needed.
3. In a blender or by hand, finely chop celery, onion, scallion, and garlic. Set aside.
4. Add the chopped vegetables to the barley mixture and mix thoroughly with a wooden spoon or hands.
5. Shape into six burgers.
6. Heat olive oil in a nonstick skillet and brown the patties for 5-7 minutes on each side, or bake at 350°F on a lightly oiled cookie sheet for 25 minutes.
7. Serve on a hamburger bun with sprouts and tomato slices or ketchup.
